_comment: The Red Pen adversary (prompts/red-pen.md) driving the local CLIs. Claude proposes; Gemini and Codex each attack in the Red Pen's voice, ending every turn with a SEVERITY + EFFORT line. Run in the default severity mode: `node orchestrate.mjs --task "..." --config agents.redpen.json --rounds 5`. The loop stops when both adversaries' strongest objection is at/below the --floor tier (default COSMETIC = nothing Critical or Important left). Same install/auth as agents.cli.json. For API transport instead, change each adapter to "openrouter" and add a "model".

proposer.name: Claude (proposer)
proposer.system: You are a careful, concrete builder. Produce strong, complete work and improve it honestly when the Red Pen lands a real attack — but do not over-correct for objections in the noise band.
